description: An analyst must deploy the latest 'Patch Tuesday' security updates to all corporate workstations.

nodes.task_description: Review the latest security patches from Microsoft and identify which are critical and relevant to the workstation environment.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst correctly identifies all critical patches to be deployed.

nodes.task_description: First, deploy the patches to a small pilot group of test workstations to check for any negative impacts.

expected_outcome.value: The patches are successfully deployed to the pilot group with no reported issues.

nodes.task_description: After a successful pilot, schedule the patch deployment for all remaining workstations during the nightly maintenance window.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst successfully schedules the enterprise-wide deployment.
